title: ACCOMPANIMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: INTERFAITH MOVEMENT FOR IMMIGRANT JUSTICE ACCOMPANIMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides accompaniment services for individuals attending ICE check-ins, immigration court hearting, Intensive Supervision Appearance Program appointments, and other mandatory dates during the immigration process. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 550-3510 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 550-3510 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for appointment or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
